message:
security: Add shell escaping for paths in SSH/rsync commands

Escapes remote paths and identity file paths used in:
- rsync destination/source arguments
- mkdir remote commands
- cd commands for remote execution
- cleanup commands

Uses shell_escape crate to prevent command injection via
specially crafted project paths or worker identity file paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
